Case# TKSmartCardPINFormat.Encoding.bcd

iOS 9.0+iPadOS 9.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.11+tvOS 11.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 4.0+

```
case bcd
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKSmartCardPINFormat/Encoding-swift.enum/bcd#Discussion)

Characters (only digits) are encoded in BCD format (for example, `1234` is encoded as `12h 34h`).
